title: Create More Seats
description: Mod that adds two types of modern seats for trains and contraptions.
body:
## Create More Seats Please also take a look at my other mods: * [Create Train Utilities](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-trainutilities) * [Create Train Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-train-lights) ![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3b54ad5c623f7d9152857979f2b729e46bf43037_0.webp) Mod that adds two types of modern seats for trains and contraptions. [![discord](https://discord.com/api/guilds/1248636479627071488/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/DkcprwueFj) ## Dependencies * [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) / [Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) * [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) ## Features ### Seats in Action
### All Variants
### More Features * Use on Trains * dyeable ## Languages * English ## Important! You should always back up your world before installing a mod update to protect your world from damage. ## Support me If you want to support me and my work, check out my Ko-fi Page ❤️ * [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/adeptstack_programmerlp) ## Credits Thanks to Vinicius M for making the visual work :)
